# AddMediaMediaDestinationUnsupportedReason

**Type**

Reasons the media service can’t add media items to a specified playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
string AddMediaMediaDestinationUnsupportedReason
```

## Reporting a Problem

- **AddMediaMediaDestinationResolutionResult.Unsupported**: The reason your service can’t add media items to the specified library or playlist.
